Widget Sync Spec

v0.1.0-draft · status: draft

§1. Sync Requirements

REQ-WS-001: WHEN a widget changes, the system updates the cache.

REQ-WS-001: WHEN the sync fails, retry the operation.

§2. Token Handling

The sync token authenticates each request. The sync-token is rotated daily by the scheduler. A stale auth token is rejected at the edge, and the expired credential must then be refreshed by the client.

§3. Cache Layer

We chose Redis over Memcached because our team already operates a Redis cluster and it supports persistence — this decision was driven by the 2026 Q1 ops review.

#!/usr/bin/env bash
redis-cli SET "widget:$1" "$2" EX 3600

§4. Rollout Notes

Spawn-2 で本 section を追加した。 2026-05-20 の sprint review で retry 上限を 3 回に決定し、 前回の session では指数 backoff を見送った。 今回の wave では cache TTL を 1 時間へ引き下げている。

REQ-WS-010: the system SHALL cap sync retries at three attempts.

§5. Conflict Resolution

REQ-WS-020 Event

競合時は常に server 側の値を採用し、 client の変更は破棄する (last-write-wins は使わない)。

normative (machine)

REQ-WS-020: WHEN two widget updates conflict, the system SHALL resolve the conflict by last-write-wins, keeping whichever update has the most recent timestamp.
